assertions.description: SVGTextPathElement is exposed for textPath elements.
SVGTextPathElement exposes the startOffset reflected IDL attribute.
SVGTextPathElement exposes the method reflected IDL attribute.
SVGTextPathElement exposes the spacing reflected IDL attribute.
A textPath element preserves path data set through its inline path content attribute.
assertions.test: (() => { const tp = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'textPath'); const data = 'M 0,20 L 240,20'; tp.setAttribute('path', data); return tp.getAttribute('path') === data; })()

assertions.description: A textPath with a valid inline path attribute renders text without referencing a separate path element.
assertions.test: (() => { try { const ns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'; const svg=document.createElementNS(ns,'svg'); const text=document.createElementNS(ns,'text'); const tp=document.createElementNS(ns,'textPath'); tp.setAttribute('path','M 0,20 L 240,20'); tp.textContent='Inline path text'; text.append(tp); svg.append(text); svg.setAttribute('width','300'); svg.setAttribute('height','80'); svg.style.position='absolute'; svg.style.left='-9999px'; document.body.append(svg); const box=text.getBBox(); svg.remove(); return box.width > 0 && box.y < 40; } catch (_) { return false; } })()

assertions.description: A textPath without an inline path attribute still renders through the existing href path fallback.
assertions.test: (() => { try { const ns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'; const svg=document.createElementNS(ns,'svg'); const defs=document.createElementNS(ns,'defs'); const path=document.createElementNS(ns,'path'); const text=document.createElementNS(ns,'text'); const tp=document.createElementNS(ns,'textPath'); path.id='fallback-path-check'; path.setAttribute('d','M 0,80 L 240,80'); defs.append(path); tp.setAttribute('href','#fallback-path-check'); tp.textContent='Fallback path text'; text.append(tp); svg.append(defs,text); svg.setAttribute('width','300'); svg.setAttribute('height','120'); svg.style.position='absolute'; svg.style.left='-9999px'; document.body.append(svg); const box=text.getBBox(); svg.remove(); return box.width > 0 && box.y > 40; } catch (_) { return false; } })()

assertions.description: When both path and href are present, the valid inline path attribute is the rendered path.
assertions.test: (() => { try { const ns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'; const svg=document.createElementNS(ns,'svg'); const defs=document.createElementNS(ns,'defs'); const path=document.createElementNS(ns,'path'); const text=document.createElementNS(ns,'text'); const tp=document.createElementNS(ns,'textPath'); path.id='precedence-fallback-path'; path.setAttribute('d','M 0,80 L 240,80'); defs.append(path); tp.setAttribute('path','M 0,20 L 240,20'); tp.setAttribute('href','#precedence-fallback-path'); tp.textContent='Precedence text'; text.append(tp); svg.append(defs,text); svg.setAttribute('width','300'); svg.setAttribute('height','120'); svg.style.position='absolute'; svg.style.left='-9999px'; document.body.append(svg); const box=text.getBBox(); svg.remove(); return box.width > 0 && box.y < 40; } catch (_) { return false; } })()

assertions.description: An empty inline path attribute does not prevent the href path fallback from rendering text.
assertions.test: (() => { try { const ns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'; const svg=document.createElementNS(ns,'svg'); const defs=document.createElementNS(ns,'defs'); const path=document.createElementNS(ns,'path'); const text=document.createElementNS(ns,'text'); const tp=document.createElementNS(ns,'textPath'); path.id='empty-path-fallback'; path.setAttribute('d','M 0,80 L 240,80'); defs.append(path); tp.setAttribute('path',''); tp.setAttribute('href','#empty-path-fallback'); tp.textContent='Empty path fallback'; text.append(tp); svg.append(defs,text); svg.setAttribute('width','300'); svg.setAttribute('height','120'); svg.style.position='absolute'; svg.style.left='-9999px'; document.body.append(svg); const box=text.getBBox(); svg.remove(); return box.width > 0 && box.y > 40; } catch (_) { return false; } })()
